title: About Us
description: Budget Ndio Story is a Kenya wide consortium translating public budgets into clear, usable, youth friendly information.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Budget Ndio Story is a Kenya wide consortium led by The Continental Pot, Colour Twist Media, and Sen Media & Events, translating public budgets into clear, usable, youth friendly information. We convene creators, civil society, universities, and partners to pair fiscal analysis with creator-led storytelling, grow budget literacy, and strengthen accountability from priorities to results.
about.mission: We make Kenya's budget information clear, usable, and youth-friendly—so young people can participate, shape priorities, and track results.
about.partners: Budget Ndio Story is a consortium led by The Continental Pot, Colour Twist Media, and Sen Media & Events, working with creators, influencers, civil society, universities, and partners across Kenya to grow budget literacy and strengthen accountability.

partner.title: Partner With Us
partner.intro: We work with universities, youth networks, civil society, media, and institutions to expand budget literacy and civic action.

subscribe.title: Get budget updates
subscribe.body: Reports, participation windows, and training alerts—straight to you.

footer.signature: Follow the Budget. Find the Story.
